projects.name: Chatmunication
projects.description: A clean and modern communication platform designed for seamless voice calls, video calls, and instant messaging—all in one place. Crafted with a light, friendly interface to enhance clarity and usability, this UI concept focuses on intuitive navigation and delightful user interactions. Core features: 🎙️ One-tap voice calling 📹 High-quality video chat 💬 Fast and reliable messaging ✨ Simple, minimal, and user-first design

projects.name: Solar Powered Seaweed Heater
projects.description:
The increasing demand for high-quality dried seaweed necessitates an efficient and precise drying system. This study proposes the design of a seaweed drying system using the Fuzzy method based on the Internet of Things (IoT). The system is designed to monitor and control temperature and humidity levels in real- time to optimize the drying process. The implementation of IoT enables seaweed

farmers to monitor the drying progress through a website, as well as perform remote monitoring and automation, thereby enhancing drying efficiency and product quality. The Fuzzy method is used to determine the optimal drying conditions based on automatically detected environmental parameters. The test results show that this system can reduce the drying time to 15 hours, significantly faster compared to traditional methods that take 3 days to 1 week. The application of the Fuzzy method in the drying control system provides better precision and responsiveness, and is capable of adjusting drying parameters based on detected environmental conditions.

projects.name: KilanAccurate
projects.description: A modern and effortless attendance system built for onsite companies, combining a mobile app, admin dashboard, and secure backend into one smooth experience. Designed with clarity and speed in mind, it ensures accurate check-ins and easy staff management for everyday operations. Core features: 📍 Onsite-verified mobile attendance 📊 Real-time admin monitoring 🗂️ Schedule and employee management 🔒 Secure backend and data handling ✨ Simple, reliable, and company-ready design

projects.name: Solar Powered Park Bench
projects.description: The importance of electricity for daily life is because electricity is inherent in basic human needs. Generally electricity is produced from fossil energy derived from the remains of living things that have been buried millions of years. The increasing need for electrical energy means also increases the needs of fossil energy which requires a long time to be utilized as a power plant power source. Solar power generation lately is certainly a new alternative to replace fossil-powered electricity generation. Of course in Indonesia, a tropical climate has the advantage of utilizing solar radiation into a source of electricity. By utilizing solar panels to supply VRLA batteries as power supply to lamps controlled by Arduino Uno microcontrollers and cell phone Charging Stations that will charge VRLA batteries during the day and can be enjoyed at night.
